channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: RoundSignal 2026-W30: 10 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
RoundSignal Issue 2026-W30

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

10 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

telli

heat 88

Trigger: Seed round €13.1M / $15M, led by redalpine (multi-source: EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026); total funding now >€16.1M

Why now: Berlin-based YC-backed AI startup for B2C customer operations just closed a sizeable seed and will be hiring and scaling GTM fast — prime window for RevOps, growth and recruiting service providers.

Who to contact: VP Growth / Head of Operations

Angle: Reference their redalpine-led seed and offer to stand up a repeatable outbound + RevOps motion so their AI-for-B2C-ops product can scale customer acquisition as fast as they're scaling the tech.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

kausable

heat 82

Trigger: Seed round €12M, led by UVC Partners and Entourage (multi-source: EU-Startups & Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026)

Why now: German DeepTech AI firm with fresh €12M seed will be building out research and commercial teams — good fit for technical recruiting, brand/PR and go-to-market support.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate them on the UVC-led €12M seed and offer help translating a 'reasoning-first AI' story into enterprise-ready positioning and a hiring pipeline for their first commercial hires.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Float

heat 80

Trigger: Series A €4.5M to expand AI-native finance platform for European startups (BeBeez International, as of 15 Jul 2026)

Why now: Stockholm-born B2B SaaS fintech raising a Series A to expand across Europe — will need marketing, RevOps and localized growth support to hit expansion targets, and sells to your same startup ICP.

Who to contact: Head of Marketing / CMO

Angle: Note their €4.5M Series A and European expansion plan, and offer a market-entry growth playbook for each new country rather than one-size-fits-all campaigns.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Ossprey

heat 78

Trigger: Pre-seed $2.65M / £2m oversubscribed round to stop software supply chain attacks (multi-source: Tech.eu & UKTN, as of 22 Jul 2026)

Why now: UK software supply-chain security startup with fresh pre-seed is explicitly expanding engineering and commercial teams — immediate need for recruiting, dev and go-to-market services.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their oversubscribed pre-seed and offer to build out their first commercial engine (positioning + outbound) so early product-market signals convert into paying enterprise pipeline.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Arrakis

heat 77

Trigger: Emerged from stealth with ~$40M raised in just over three months; backed by OpenAI and Datadog leaders (Tech.eu, as of 22 Jul 2026)

Why now: London AI deployment startup just came out of stealth with heavy backing — will scale team and brand rapidly; strong fit for PR, recruiting and RevOps providers who move fast.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of Talent

Angle: Congratulate them on the stealth exit with OpenAI/Datadog backers and offer a launch-PR + rapid technical-recruiting sprint to capitalize on the attention window.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Cascade

heat 74

Trigger: Seed $3.5M led by Andreessen Horowitz Speedrun (Tech.eu, as of 21 Jul 2026)

Why now: London AI startup predicting engineering/construction projects, freshly seeded by a16z Speedrun — will invest in growth and hiring; sells B2B so fits the vertical and needs GTM support.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference the a16z Speedrun seed and offer to build a targeted ABM motion aimed at the construction/engineering buyers they now need to reach.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

PageMind

heat 70

Trigger: €1.2M funding to scale AI for e-commerce product discovery, expanding team and US growth (Tech.eu, as of 23 Jul 2026)

Why now: Spanish B2B SaaS with fresh capital is explicitly expanding its team and entering the US — a clear moment for recruiting, growth-marketing and US market-entry service sellers.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of Growth

Angle: Cite their €1.2M raise and US expansion plan and offer a lean US go-to-market test before they commit budget to a full team build-out.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

StrongestLayer

heat 60

Trigger: (unverified) Seed funding extension $4.1M (SecurityWeek, as of 22 Jul 2026)

Why now: Cybersecurity startup with a fresh seed extension — likely investing in commercial ramp; single-source so verify, but a plausible target for RevOps/PR services in the funded-startup vertical.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their seed extension and offer a focused demand-gen pilot tailored to security buyers rather than a broad marketing retainer.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Infinity

heat 58

Trigger: (unverified) Seed $15M to build software layer making any AI chip inference-ready (Business Wire, as of 20 Jul 2026)

Why now: AI-infrastructure B2B startup with a substantial seed will scale engineering and GTM; single-source so confirm, but a strong-fit funded account for technical recruiting and PR.

Who to contact: Founder / VP Engineering

Angle: Congratulate them on the $15M seed and offer a specialized ML-infra recruiting sprint to fill the senior roles a hardware-adjacent product demands.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

Thira

heat 55

Trigger: (unverified) Seed $21M led by Madrona (My Startup World, as of 17 Jul 2026)

Why now: Sizeable seed round signals imminent team and GTM build-out; single thin source so verify, but the amount and lead investor make it a worthwhile funded-startup target.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of Growth

Angle: Reference the Madrona-led $21M seed and offer to help them stand up a repeatable go-to-market before headcount balloons.

Best-touch window: reach out before ~Aug 20 — the signal decays within weeks.

source

© RoundSignal. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
